files.role: Central orchestrator for lane state management. Owns the lane Ref, replays events through the state machine, and coordinates with BinderService for evidence collection.
dependencies: effect (Context, Effect, Layer, Option, Ref, Schema)
./binder (Service as BinderService, Binder, BinderLayer, BinderError, BinderLaneState)

key_types.TransitionRecord: { from: StateTag, to: StateTag, eventType: string, timestamp: number }
key_types.RoleOutput: Discriminated union per role type: scout, architect, critic, executor, validator, redteam, historian, repair — each with role-specific fields like verdict, findings, commitSha
key_types.LaneState: { campaignId, scope, dependencies[], currentState: StateTag, initialState, stateHistory[], transitionCount, createdAt, updatedAt, laneId }
key_types.LaneReadState: { currentState: StateTag, stateHistory[], transitionCount, createdAt, updatedAt, laneId }

methods.name: createLane
methods.signature: (campaignId: string, scope: string, dependencies: string[]) => Effect.Effect<string>
methods.description: Creates lane, writes LaneCreated event, calls binder.ensureBinder

methods.name: processEvent
methods.description: Loads lane, reduces via LANE_STATE_MACHINE, persists to EventStore, updates binder

methods.name: launchRole
methods.description: Validates state allows role, writes launch event

methods.name: handleRoleOutput
methods.description: Core method: converts RoleOutput to RuntimeEvent via roleOutputToEvent, calls processEvent per event. Routes critic verdicts, red-team findings, historian commits. Line 868.

methods.name: returnLane
methods.description: Validates terminal state, calls binder.finalizeBinder. Rejects non-terminal.

methods.name: loadLane
methods.description: Cold-start reconstruction: queries EventStore, replays through reduceCampaignState

make_function.description: Creates Ref<Map<string, CampaignState>> for lane registry. Uses EventStore, BinderService.

layer.definition: export const layer: Layer.Layer<Service, never, EventStore.Service> = Layer.effect(Service, make).pipe(Layer.provide(BinderLayer))
layer.dependency_chain: Secretary.layer requires EventStore.Service; internally provides BinderLayer

helper_functions.name: blockingFindings
helper_functions.signature: const fn — extracts blocking findings from red-team output

files.role: Evidence binder — collects artifacts, reviews, validation results, red-team findings into an immutable Binder record. Append-only evidence chain per lane.

key_types.LaneState: created | scouting | scoped | planning | critic_review | approved | executing | validating | red_team | historian | checkpointed | returned | failed | blocked | repairing

binder_interface.description: The Binder record — accumulated evidence for a lane. Immutable after finalizeBinder.

methods.name: updateStatus
methods.signature: (laneId, status: LaneState, terminalStatus?: TerminalStatus) => Effect<void, BinderError>

methods.name: finalizeBinder
methods.description: Freezes binder, computes artifactDigest, sets completedAt

methods.name: reconstructBinder
methods.description: Reconstructs from event store for durability proof

make_function.description: Creates Ref<Map<string, Binder>> for binder registry.

layer.definition: export const layer: Layer.Layer<Service, never, EventStore.Service> = Layer.effect(Service, make)

files.role: Declarative state machine spec + deterministic reducer. Defines LANE_STATE_MACHINE and CAMPAIGN_STATE_MACHINE.

key_types.TransitionRule: { to: string, predicate: PredicateSpec, priority?: number }
key_types.AgentStateSpec: { transitions: TransitionRule[], retryPolicies?: RetryPolicy[], entryActions?: ActionSpec[] }
key_types.StateTransition: { from: string, to: string, eventType: string, timestamp: number }
key_types.CampaignState: { currentState, events[], transitionCount, stateHistory[], metadata, retryBudgets: Record<string, number> }

notable_transitions: repairing -> approved (predicate: repair_completed, retry budget gated)

key_functions.name: executeEntryAction
key_functions.description: Mutates retryBudgets (e.g. decrements repair budget on entry to repairing)

key_functions.name: augmentEvent
key_functions.description: Enriches events with retry budget info

key_functions.name: reduceCampaignState
key_functions.signature: (previous: CampaignState, events: readonly RuntimeEvent[], spec: AgentMachineSpec) => CampaignState
key_functions.description: Pure deterministic function. Replays events, checks predicates, accumulates history, executes entry actions.

files.role: Typed transition predicate engine. Checks PredicateSpecs against event ledger, file memory, and claims.

key_types.PredicateResult: { satisfied: boolean, evidence?: EvidenceRef, reason?: string }
key_types.PredicateContext: { events[], sessionId, currentState?, retryBudgets?, claims?, files[] }

key_functions.name: checkTransitions
key_functions.description: Finds first matching transition in priority order

key_functions.name: checkPredicateEffect
key_functions.description: Async variant with Effect-based event store

files.role: Durable event storage backed by DatabaseAdapter. Records and queries RuntimeEvents with typed filters.

key_types.QueryFilters: { sessionId?, runId?, eventType?, actor?, status?, parentEventId?, fromTs?, toTs?, toolName?, laneId?, limit?, offset?, order?: 'asc'|'desc' }
key_types.Interface: { record(event: RuntimeEvent) => Effect<void>, query(filters?: QueryFilters) => Effect<RuntimeEvent[], DatabaseError> }

files.role: PG test harness. PGlite (in-memory per call) for local dev, real Postgres with schema isolation for CI.

exports.name: makePGLayer
exports.description: Fresh in-memory PGlite per call. No shared state.

exports.name: pgTestLayer
exports.description: Layer.unwrap: checks OPENCODE_DATABASE_URL -> Real PG or PGlite.

pglite_details.creation: new PGlite() — no arguments, pure in-memory instance
pglite_details.migrations: Reads from ../../migration-pg/, applies in order, tracks in __drizzle_migrations
pglite_details.adapter: Drizzle wraps PGlite client -> makeAdapterFromClient creates DatabaseAdapter.Interface (query, transaction, afterCommit)
pglite_details.isolation: Each call to makePGLayer() creates independent instance. No files, no shared state.

internal_functions.name: makeAdapterFromClient
internal_functions.description: Wraps client with query(), transaction() (retry on serialization), afterCommit() hooks

files.role: Integration proof tests for full campaign lifecycle against PG-backed Secretary.

layer_wiring.description: PGlite-backed DatabaseAdapter -> EventStore -> Secretary/Binder. Full real stack.

test_proofs.name: Full happy path
test_proofs.description: created through returned, Binder finalized with digest

test_proofs.name: Cold-start reconstruction
test_proofs.description: Rebuild Secretary, loadLane proves durable events

test_proofs.name: Critic rejection -> no approval
test_proofs.description: Rejected routes to repairing instead of approved

test_proofs.name: Claims gate requires evidence
test_proofs.description: Claims predicate fails without positive evidence

test_proofs.name: Validation freshness
test_proofs.description: Stale validations rejected by freshness predicate

test_proofs.name: Red-team blocking -> repair
test_proofs.description: Blocking findings route to repairing with decrement_repair_budget

supporting_files.role: Canonical Schema definitions: LaneState, CampaignState, TerminalStatus, RoleType, ProposedBy, EvidenceRef, RuntimeEvent, Transition, Role, Binder, Lane, Campaign.
Role authority contracts — allowed tools, file scopes, authority modes per role. Used by secretary.launchRole.
Barrel for event subsystem — exports EventStore, RuntimeEventTable, EventName

architectural_notes.state_machine_architecture: Pure functional reduceCampaignState(previous, events, spec) => CampaignState. Deterministic. Predicates delegated to ./predicates.ts dispatcher.
architectural_notes.evidence_chain: Events -> EventStore (durable PG) -> Secretary replays via SM -> Binder collects artifacts -> finalizeBinder computes digest -> reconstructBinder verifies.
architectural_notes.cold_start_proof: loadLane() queries EventStore for all lane events, replays through reduceCampaignState — proves state is reconstructable from event ledger.
architectural_notes.retry_budget_mechanism: repairing state has decrement_repair_budget entry action. repair_budget_exhausted predicate -> failed. Budgets mutable during reduction pass but deterministic.
architectural_notes.test_isolation: PGlite: each makePGLayer() creates fresh in-memory instance. Migrations applied per-instance. Real PG: schema-per-test via CREATE SCHEMA + SET search_path.
